name: han-documentation
description: Documentation skills for the Han suite: writing down what the team built and decided. Home of project-documentation (create and maintain documentation for features, systems, and components), architectural-decision-record (create, extract, or convert ADRs), and runbook (create or update a runbook for a single operational scenario, gated by a YAGNI preflight). Depends on han-communication and han-core; bundled by the han meta-plugin.
